case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. JOHN LAFFEY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT LAFFEY, JOHN DBA: L & L CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED IN FULL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT LAFFEY, JOHN DBA: L & L CONSTRUCTION
